titleStmt.title: SII 11.181: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 181. (B.K. No. 77 of 1927-28.) DŌṆI, MUṆḌARGI PĒṬHĀ, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE SIDDHALIṄGADĒVA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The inscription registers the gift of certain annual taxes made by Pannāyada-suṅkavergaḍe Viṭṭarasa, at the command of Sarvādhikāri, Manevergaḍe, Mahāprachaṇḍa-Daṇḍanāyaka, Mahādēva-Bhaṭṭa to Śaktiśiva-Paṇḍita, for the benefit of the temple of Siddhēśvaradēva, in the presence of the Sixty Mahājanas headed by the Ūroḍeya of Drōṇāpura and of the several Seṭṭis. A gift of money made by the toll officer Mādirāja and Mulihi-Seṭṭi is also recorded. Further, after praising the Body of Ugura Three-Hundred, it records gifts of certain duties made by them to the same Śaktiśiva-Paṇḍita for the benefit of the temple. Śaktiśiva was the disciple of Lakshmīdhara-Paṇḍita and the āchārya of the temple.

The inscription is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 19, Bhāva, Pushya, śu. 5, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, vyatīpāta. The saṅkrānti occurred not on śu. 5 (which was Friday), but on śu. 15 which was a Sunday = A.D. 1094, December 24, on which day it commenced at ·67.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī cāḷukyavikramavarṣa 19 ne
ya bhāvasaṁvatsarada puṣyasuddha paṁcami Ādityavāra Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti byatīpāta daṁdu svasti sa
mastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmatsarbbādhikāri maneverggaḍe mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ mahādēvabhaṭṭara besadiṁ sa
mastaguṇaviśēṣōnna tarappa śrīmatpannāyada suṁkaverggaḍe viṭṭarasaṁ drōṇāpure doroḍeyapramukha mahājana ma
rvadiṁrbaruṁ samasta seṭṭiyara sannidhānadoḷ siddhēśvaradēva raṁgabhōgakkaṁ nandādī vigega malliyācāryyaru śaktiśiva
paṇḍitargge dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍi dōṇiya kuḷiya pannāyada suṁka doṁdu varṣasthiti yinācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ naḍevaṁtu
māḍi koṭṭa gadyāṇaṁ 6 paṇa 7 Antā poṁgaḷa nāstheḷedoḷu naḍeva mānasarē tiṁgaḷiga Aydu paṇa vaḍḍamaṁ kuḍutuṁ
variṣakka ydisuttaṁ barpparu © Ī dharmmaṁ pannāyada suṁkama nāḷva mahāpuruṣarāro rbba ravara dharmma mida navarē
pratipāḷisuttaṁ barpparu . mattaṁ drōṇāpurada mēlāḷkeya perjjuṁkada mādirājanu mulihiseṭṭiyuṁ tamma suṁkado
ḷage dēvaraṁgabhōgakke varṣasthitiyi nācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ naḍevantu koṭṭa paṇavāṟu . Avaṁ tiṁgaḷiṁge pattu vīsamaṁ kuḍutuṁ barisa
kkeydisuttuṁ barpparu . Ida nārādoḍe tamma kāladoḷ tamma dharmmamāgi parirakṣisuvaru © mattu . vṛtta © parasai
nyārṇnavabāḍavānaḷa ranēkārtthiprayūthēṁdrabhūmiruha rbbhāsurakīrttivarttita diśācakra rddayādharmmatatpara rārādhita
śaṁbhucārucaraṇāṁbhōjātayugma rssadācaraṇa rttāvene sandorugura mūnūrbba rjagadbhuṁbhukar . śaraṇāyātajanaṁ
gaḷaṁ karuṇadiṁ kāvūḷpaniṁ vajrapaṁjaradanna rṇnera dāntarātibaḷamaṁ saṁhāripātmīyabhī karaśauryyōdayadiṁ parīkṣipoḍele bā
vannavīrarkka ḷannarivarttāvene saṁdariṁ tugura mūnūrbba rjjagadbhuṁbhukar . tava gettānuṁ moga kkondinisu muḷisu baṁdandu gō
trādrisaṁghātava nettaṁ patti kirttettuva ruṟepiḍi dudyaddiśānēkapānīkava nārddoṁ donde tō ḷtāgipa ravayavadiṁ suṟrenaltāynelam
dōṟuvinaṁ mūnūrbbaruṁ vārddhiga ḷanituva nāḷāpadiṁ pīrddu tōrppar . Antenisi ne ga ḻdugura mūnūrbbaru mirddu sidhdhē
śvaradēvargge Alliyācāryya svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamō nānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiśīḷasaṁpannaruṁ
gurukuḷasamuddharaṇaru manēkārtthaśāstrapārāvārapāragarumappa śrīmallakṣmīdhara paṇḍitara śiṣyarappa śaktiśiva
paṁḍitargge dhārāporbbakaṁ māḍi Ī grāmadoḷo veleya pēṟiṁgaṁ vīsa 2 bhaṇḍihoṟege bēḷe lekkadiṁ tavage naḍeva darisinama
nācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ naḍevantu māḍikoṭṭaru . mattaṁ hosabarappa koylāḷigaḷu bandī yūroḷ koyvarappoḍe dēvargge
darisinama neraḍu paṇamaṁ koṭṭu koyvar .
Digital edition of SII 11.181 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
